description: How it works with numbered steps and booking CTA

fields.name: Headline
fields.default: Book Your First Class in Minutes

fields.name: Subheadline
fields.default: No complicated sign-ups, no long-term commitments. Just show up and move.

default.title: Choose Your Class
default.description: Browse the schedule and pick a class that fits your level and your calendar. First class is always free.

default.title: Book Your Spot
default.description: Reserve online in seconds. You'll get a confirmation with everything you need to know before you arrive.

default.title: Show Up & Flow
default.description: Arrive 10 minutes early, roll out a mat, and let the practice meet you where you are. We handle the rest.

fields.name: Note
fields.default: New students: your first class is on us.
